newsSince: MATERIAL: on June 19, 2026 Fujikura unexpectedly raised FY operating-income guidance to ~¥310bn from ¥211bn, citing optical-fiber price increases and strong AI-hyperscaler demand; shares hit limit-up (+44% since June 9). The earlier ¥300bn / ~3x capacity-triple plan and US subsidiary (Delaware) are March-2026 news being executed. The guidance beat confirms AI-fiber pricing power for the sector.

sources.label: Bloomberg - Fujikura shares surge on profit outlook hike
DCD - Fujikura to triple fiber output, $2bn investment

verdicts.rankRationale: Fundamentals genuinely improved: the June 19 guidance hike (OP ¥310bn vs ¥211bn) on AI-fiber pricing power is a real positive datapoint, so +2 on the thesis. But this page's lens treats Fujikura as the discovered 'control,' and a +44% limit-up exhausts the latent/under-covered angle entirely. Net hold on rank despite the fundamental tick.
verdicts.bull: Guidance hike confirms fiber pricing power + AI demand; ~3x capacity + US plant locks multi-year volume.
verdicts.neutral: Strong fundamentals but the crowd has fully discovered the name; control, not fresh alpha.
verdicts.bear: +44% in two weeks on top of +111% YTD; any pricing normalization de-rates hard.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: FY guidance hike / fiber pricing power
